title: volume prune
body:
enable podman-remote volume prune
    
allow users to remotely prune volumes.
    
this is the last volume command for remote enablement.  as such, the volume commands are being folded back into main because they are supported for both local and remote clients.
    
also, enable all volume tests that do not use containers as containers are not enabled for the remote client yet.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>
